events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock icon. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Six decades of rock and still going strong. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched, 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, changing music forever. The very first video played? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which was originally released on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped their debut 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, hundreds of thousands gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in time. What artists from the festival would you have loved to see?

events.title: Elvis Presley's passing remembered
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of 'The King of Rock & Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering 'The King', Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur remembered
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Tupac Shakur being shot in Las Vegas in 1996; he would pass away on September 13, 1996, and would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains profound. What's your favourite track from his incredible legacy?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix remembered
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. His guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', which was officially released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your go-to track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and the voice of The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! A voice that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from the legendary frontman?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine', which was released as a single on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and unity. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released, 25 years ago
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Apple releasing the first-generation iPod in 2001, which was officially announced on October 23 and shipped on November 10.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. Thousands of songs in your pocket! What was your first MP3 player?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007. What's your all-time favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's the John Lennon song that means the most to you?
